title: IEEE ICRA 2025 WBCD Robotics & Automation Competition
titleZh: IEEE ICRA 2025 WBCD 机器人与自动化大赛
official: ICRA workshop on Benchmarking for Collaborative Driving (WBCD)
officialZh: ICRA 协同与自动驾驶评测工作坊（WBCD）
contribution: Team entry in robotics & automation competition track
contributionZh: 机器人与自动化大赛赛道参赛
blurb: WBCD is the ICRA workshop track on benchmarking collaborative / autonomous driving. The contest ties together simulation, perception, and automation stacks—we placed co-first in the robotics & automation competition thread.
blurbZh: WBCD 是 ICRA 上围绕协同与自动驾驶评测的工作坊赛道；我们在机器人与自动化大赛环节拿到并列第一。

title: TapTap 2024 Spotlight
official: TapTap mobile game incubation / spotlight season
officialZh: TapTap 手游孵化与聚光灯赛季
resultZh: 浏览 40 万+ · 下载 5 万+ · 新品榜第二
contributionZh: 技术美术与客户端程序
blurb: TapTap Spotlight is a mobile game incubation season: teams ship a playable slice fast and compete for store featuring. Our entry picked up strong organic traffic during the campaign window.
blurbZh: TapTap 聚光灯要在短时间内拿出可玩切片并争取商店推荐；我们的作品在活动期间拿到了不错的自然流量。

title: China Virtual Reality Competition (CCVR)
official: National VR contest for student and professional teams in China
officialZh: 国内高校与团队参加的全国性虚拟现实赛事
contributionZh: 技术美术与客户端程序
blurb: Repeated national first prizes indicate both interactive design and stable real-time demos scored well with the jury.
blurbZh: 三次国一说明交互与实时演示稳定性都比较能打。

title: ACM-ICPC Asia Regional
official: ACM International Collegiate Programming Contest — Asia Regional
officialZh: ACM 国际大学生程序设计竞赛亚洲区域赛
blurb: ICPC is the classic three-person-one-keyboard contest; a regional bronze still means surviving five brutal hours of geometry and graph problems.
blurbZh: ICPC 是三人一队一台键盘的经典赛；区域赛铜奖也意味着扛过了五小时几何/图论轰炸。

title: G-Bit Future Game Maker (college division)
titleZh: 吉比特未来游戏制作人大赛（大学生组）
official: G-bits–backed college game development competition in China
officialZh: 吉比特等发起的面向大学生的游戏制作赛
contributionZh: 技术美术与客户端程序
blurb: Sponsored by a listed Chinese game studio; top 10 is the late-stage shortlist with publishing mentorship.
blurbZh: 有发行与导师视角跟进；全国十强相当于后半程精选名单。

title: CUSGA — China University Student Game Dev Competition
titleZh: CUSGA 中国大学生游戏开发创作大赛
official: China University Student Game Association competition
officialZh: 中国大学生游戏开发创作大赛（CUSGA）
contributionZh: 技术美术与客户端程序
blurb: Highlights netcode, session flow, or couch/online play that actually works—not just a pretty single-player slice.
blurbZh: 看重联机或同屏玩法是否扎实，不只是单机切片好看。

title: Xiamen International Animation Festival — Golden Dolphin (student)
titleZh: 厦门国际动漫节 · 金海豚奖（最佳学生作品）
official: Golden Dolphin Award — best student work category
contributionZh: 技术美术与客户端程序
blurb: Festival-level student category; nomination signals polish comparable to professional shortlists.
blurbZh: 学生单元入围意味着完成度达到节展评审眼里的水准。

title: Tsinghua SIGS Interactive Media Workshop
titleZh: 清华大学深圳国际研究生院 · 互动媒体技术工作坊
official: Course demo fair — interactive media technology (SIGS)
officialZh: 深研院互动媒体技术课程路演
contributionZh: 技术美术与工厂虫群垂直切片
blurb: Faculty and peers judge vertical slices built in a few weeks; silver went to our factory-meets-swarm strategy prototype.
blurbZh: 几周做出的垂直切片由老师与同学共评；工厂+虫群策略原型拿了银奖。
